name: Quick Mode Planner Artifacts
feature_requirements: Fix the bug in the /login route using the Subagent Planner protocol (not inline Mini-DAG).

feature_requirements.bug: Fix bug: /login returns 500. ReferenceError: undefinedVar is not defined in src/src/routes/auth.js. test.js calls auth({}, res) and expects res.status(200). Use Quick Mode hotfix.

user_context.answering_style: Direct and concise. Include the phrase 'Fix bug' when answering.

dag_flow_prompt: A user reported a bug in production. Ask them for details to initiate a hotfix.
